stemHtml:
The load sheet of a light aircraft shows that the TOM is 4400 lb and the CG is located 95 in. aft of the datum.

Calculate the mass of bags that needs to be moved from the rear cargo compartment (located 178 in. aft of the datum), to the forward cargo compartment (22 in. aft of the datum), in order to re-position the take-off CG to 93 in. aft of the datum.
